title: Constellation Brands to Report Second Quarter Fiscal 2024 Financial Results; Host Conference Call October 5, 2023
text: VICTOR, N.Y., Aug. 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today it will report financial results for its second quarter ended August 31, 2023, on Thursday, October 5, 2023, before the open of the U.S. markets. A conference call to discuss the financial results and outlook will be hosted by President and Chief Executive Officer, Bill Newlands, and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Garth Hankinson, at 10:30 a.m. EDT, October 5, 2023.

title: The Highest Quality Dividend Challenger Summary
text: This article presents the highest-quality Dividend Challengers, companies listed on U.S. exchanges with consistently higher annual dividend payouts for 5-9 years. The top 20 highest-quality Dividend Challengers are identified based on a quality scoring system, with Toronto-Dominion Bank, Dolby Laboratories, and Thermo Fisher Scientific making the top three. The article also highlights stocks trading at favorable valuations and offering compelling metrics for income-focused, growth-oriented, value-driven, and total-return investors.

title: Modelo Especial widens sales gap over Bud Light in wake of Dylan Mulvaney fiasco
text: Retailers are devoting more shelf space to Modelo Especial at the expense of Bud Light.

title: Alcohol use drops among young adults, while cannabis consumption grows: Gallup poll
text: The number of adults age 34 and younger who say they drink alcoholic beverages has dropped during a period of rising cannabis use, according to new survey from Gallup.

title: Modelo topples Bud Light to become America's best-selling beer for the year
text: Modelo has officially knocked Bud Light off its longstanding pedestal as the top-selling beer in America on an annual basis, ending the Anheuser-Busch brand's 22-year reign.

title: Constellation Brands to Present at the 2023 Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Wednesday, September 6, 2023
text: VICTOR, N.Y., Aug. 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today that Garth Hankinson, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the 2023 Barclays Global Consumer Staples Conference on Wednesday, September 6 in Boston, MA. The presentation is scheduled to begin at 4:30 p.m. EDT and is expected to cover the company's strategic business initiatives, financial metrics, and operating performance, as well as outlook for the future.

title: Constellation Brands to Host Investor Day on Thursday, November 2, 2023
text: VICTOR, N.Y., Aug. 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today that it will host its Investor Day on Thursday, November 2, 2023, at the New York Stock Exchange in New York City. The event is scheduled to begin at 2:00 p.m. EDT and is expected to provide investors, analysts, and other stakeholders with a comprehensive overview of the company's continued value creation opportunities supported by its strategic priorities.

title: Strength in Beer Unit Aids Constellation Brand (STZ) Amid Cost Woes

title: 3 Sizzling Stocks to Snatch Up for Hot Summer Profits
